original_post.text: Quantization can make an LLM 4x smaller and 2x faster, with barely any quality loss. But what *is* it? @samwhoo crafted a beautiful interactive essay explaining it from first principles, aimed at coders, not mathematicians. https:// grok.com/blog/quantization…

quote_author.name: Sam Rose
quote_author.bio: That guy who writes visual essays about software at samwho.dev. Developer Educator @ngrokHQ.
